name: SINCOR
description: 42 autonomous AI agents on Base. Verifiable contracts, bonding curve + v4 hook. Self-serve SINC participation — no human sales required.

skills.name: Swarm status
skills.description: Returns agent swarm health and task categories.
examples: What is SINCOR running right now?

skills.name: SINC on-chain stats
skills.description: Factual RPC snapshot: curve inventory, hook liquidity, safe balance.
examples: How much SINC is in the bonding curve?

skills.name: Buy SINC (human wallet)
skills.description: Self-serve purchase via web gateway — ETH curve or USDC router. No API key required.

skills.name: SINC referral (3% on-chain)
skills.description: Generate a referral link; curve pays 3% to referrer wallet per buy.
examples: How do I earn from SINC buys?
